# Box Drawing, Block Element, and Text Characters

Comprehensive reference for Unicode Box Drawing characters (U+2500–U+257F),
Block Elements (U+2580–U+259F), and their Code Page 437 (IBM PC / DOS) equivalents.

**Generated by**: `util/box_drawing_lookup.py`

## Background and Encoding Notes

### Code Page 437 (CP437)

Code Page 437 is the original character set of the IBM PC (1981), also known as
DOS Latin US or OEM-US. It extends ASCII (0–127) with 128 additional characters
(128–255) including box drawing characters, block elements, mathematical symbols,
and accented letters. The box drawing characters occupy CP437 positions 176–223
and were widely used in DOS text-mode user interfaces (TUIs).

### Unicode

Unicode consolidates box drawing characters into dedicated blocks:

| Block          | Range         | Count | Description                                    |
| -------------- | ------------- | ----- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Box Drawing    | U+2500–U+257F | 128   | Lines, corners, T-junctions, crosses           |
| Block Elements | U+2580–U+259F | 32    | Full/half/fractional blocks, shades, quadrants |

### Encoding Cross-Reference

Not all box drawing characters have CP437 equivalents. CP437 includes 48 box drawing
characters and a few block/shade characters (positions 176–223). Unicode provides the
full set of 128 box drawing characters plus 32 block elements, including many
light/heavy mixed variants and arc corners that CP437 lacks.

### Character Weight Terminology

| Term       | Appearance              | Example     |
| ---------- | ----------------------- | ----------- |
| **Light**  | Single thin line        | ─ │ ┌ ┐ └ ┘ |
| **Heavy**  | Single thick/bold line  | ━ ┃ ┏ ┓ ┗ ┛ |
| **Double** | Two parallel thin lines | ═ ║ ╔ ╗ ╚ ╝ |
| **Dashed** | Broken line segments    | ┄ ┅ ┆ ┇ ┈ ┉ |
| **Arc**    | Rounded/curved corners  | ╭ ╮ ╯ ╰     |

### HTML Entity Formats

Box drawing characters can be inserted in HTML using:

| Format     | Example (╔) | Description                         |
| ---------- | ----------- | ----------------------------------- |
| Hex entity | `&#x2554;`  | Unicode hex code point              |
| Dec entity | `&#9556;`   | Unicode decimal value               |
| Direct     | `╔`         | UTF-8 encoded character (preferred) |

## Visual Box Drawing Examples

### Light Single-Line Box

```bash
┌──────────────────┐
│  Light Box       │
│  (single lines)  │
├──────────────────┤
│  With divider    │
└──────────────────┘
```

### Heavy (Bold) Box

```bash
┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃  Heavy Box       ┃
┃  (bold lines)    ┃
┣━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┫
┃  With divider    ┃
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛
```

### Double-Line Box

```bash
╔══════════════════╗
║  Double Box      ║
║  (double lines)  ║
╠══════════════════╣
║  With divider    ║
╚══════════════════╝
```

### Rounded (Arc) Corners

```bash
╭──────────────────╮
│  Rounded Box     │
│  (arc corners)   │
╰──────────────────╯
```

### Mixed Single/Double Box

```bash
╒══════════════════╕
│  Single vertical │
│  Double horiz.   │
╘══════════════════╛
```

```bash
╓──────────────────╖
║  Double vertical ║
║  Single horiz.   ║
╙──────────────────╜
```

### Dashed Line Boxes

```bash
┌┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┐      ┌┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┐
┆   Triple Dash    ┆      ┊  Quadruple Dash  ┊
└┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┄┘      └┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┘
```

### Nested Boxes

```bash
╔══════════════════════════╗
║  ┌────────────────────┐  ║
║  │  ╭──────────────╮  │  ║
║  │  │  Inner Box   │  │  ║
║  │  ╰──────────────╯  │  ║
║  └────────────────────┘  ║
╚══════════════════════════╝
```

### Table Layout

```bash
┌─────────┬─────────┬─────────┐
│ Header1 │ Header2 │ Header3 │
╞═════════╪═════════╪═════════╡
│ Cell 1  │ Cell 2  │ Cell 3  │
├─────────┼─────────┼─────────┤
│ Cell 4  │ Cell 5  │ Cell 6  │
└─────────┴─────────┴─────────┘
```

### Block Elements - Progress Bar

```bash
Loading: █████████████▓▒░░░░░░░░░░ 52%
Loading: ████████████████████████░░ 92%
Loading: ██████████████████████████ 100%
```

### Block Elements - Bar Chart

```bash
  100% ┤ █
   80% ┤ █ █
   60% ┤ █ █   █
   40% ┤ █ █ █ █
   20% ┤ █ █ █ █ █
       └─┴─┴─┴─┴─┘
         A B C D E
```

### Shade Gradient

```bash
░░░░▒▒▒▒▓▓▓▓████
Light → Medium → Dark → Full
```

### Tree Diagram

```bash
project/
├── src/
│   ├── main.py
│   ├── utils/
│   │   ├── helpers.py
│   │   └── constants.py
│   └── tests/
│       └── test_main.py
├── docs/
│   └── README.md
└── setup.py
```

## Utility Scripts

### `util/box_drawing_lookup.py`

Python utility for looking up and generating box drawing character tables.

```bash
# Show all tables
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py

# Search by description keyword
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --search "corner"
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --search "double"
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --search "arc"

# Show CP437 mapping table
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --cp437

# Show full Unicode box drawing table
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --unicode

# Show block elements table
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --blocks

# Show visual box drawing examples
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --examples

# Look up a specific character
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --lookup U+2554    # By Unicode code point
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --lookup 201       # By CP437 decimal

# Generate markdown tables
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --markdown

# Generate the complete markdown document
python util/box_drawing_lookup.py --markdown-full > notes/BOX_DRAWING_ASCII.md
```

---

*Document generated by `util/box_drawing_lookup.py`*
